american_roulette.text_04: The wheel includes 0, 00, and the numbers 1 through 36. The winning result is determined when the wheel is spun.

american_roulette.text_12: Column: bet on one column of the betting table.
american_roulette.text_14: Because the wheel also includes 00, there are more green outcomes. This changes the odds and increases the risk of some bets.
american_roulette.text_15: Single-number bets are riskier, while broader bets such as color or column have a higher chance of winning.

lotto3.text_02: Lotto 3 uses one number from 000 to 999. Your ticket wins only when the full number exactly matches the complete first-prize Borlette result.

lotto3.text_11: Exact order is required: 742 wins, 247 loses.
lotto3.text_13: You bet 10 HTG on 742. If the official complete first prize is 742, your payout is 10 × 500 = 5,000 HTG.
lotto3.text_14: You play 742, but the official first prize is 247. The ticket loses because the digits are not in the exact order.
lotto3.text_15: You play 741 and the first prize is 742. A one-digit difference is still a losing ticket.
lotto3.text_17: Lotto 3 operates independently and does not change Borlette, Mariage, wallet, transaction, or authentication logic.

lotto4.text_02: Lotto 4 uses a 4-digit number from 0000 to 9999. Choose a payout option based on the published draw. The exact order matters: one misplaced digit makes the ticket lose.

lotto4.text_14: Option 1: exact 4 digits of the first prize.
lotto4.text_15: The payout depends on the multiplier assigned to that option.
lotto4.text_16: The key word is “exact.” If you play 7420 and the published result is 7240, the ticket loses because the order is different.
lotto4.text_18: Suppose the published first prize is 7420.
lotto4.text_22: If you play 7240, the result is not an exact match. The digits are the same, but the order is wrong, so the ticket loses.
lotto4.text_27: The payout depends on the selected option and its displayed multiplier.
lotto4.text_28: The ticket is placed after you choose a draw and enter your stake.

lotto5.text_04: Choose a 5-digit number, such as 74208. It is compared with the published draw combination under the rule of your selected option.
lotto5.text_05: The number must be exact, and the digit order matters.
lotto5.text_10: Enter your stake and place the bet.
lotto5.text_12: Each option uses a different rule to combine digits from the first and second prizes. The payout is based on the multiplier of the selected option.
lotto5.text_13: Your ticket wins when the selected combination matches both the option rule and the published result.
lotto5.text_15: Suppose the required combination for your option is 74208.
lotto5.text_19: If you play 72408, the ticket loses because the sequence is different.
lotto5.text_22: Each option has its own combination rule.
lotto5.text_23: The payout depends on the displayed multiplier.

mariage.text_02: Mariage is based on the three official Borlette prizes in the published draw. Number order does not matter: 12-45 is the same as 45-12.
mariage.text_05: Choose two numbers for one draw. To win, both numbers must appear among the three official Borlette prizes for that draw.
mariage.text_08: The ticket is checked automatically when the Borlette result is published.
mariage.text_11: Select your first and second numbers.
mariage.text_13: Place the bet; the stake is deducted from your wallet immediately.
mariage.text_15: Both selected numbers must appear among the three draw prizes:
mariage.text_19: If both numbers appear in the list, the ticket wins. Their order does not matter.

borlette.text_02: Borlette is easy to understand. This guide walks you through the game step by step.
borlette.text_06: Borlette is a number game where you choose a ball from 00 to 99. If your number appears among the three winning prizes in the published draw, your ticket can win.
borlette.text_07: One number gives you one chance to win.
borlette.text_11: Choose your stake, for example 10 HTG.
borlette.text_12: Place the bet to register your ticket.
borlette.text_14: Each draw has three winning numbers:
borlette.text_18: Your payout depends on which prize position contains your number.
borlette.text_23: Example: you bet 10 HTG on number 26.
borlette.text_35: After placing the bet: wallet = 490 HTG
borlette.text_40: Because 26 is the first prize, your payout is 600 HTG.
borlette.text_43: Your stake is deducted when you place the bet.
borlette.text_44: If you win, the payout is credited automatically.
borlette.text_45: If the ticket loses, the stake is not refunded.
borlette.text_46: A pending ticket is waiting for the official result.
borlette.text_47: A paid ticket means the payout has already been credited to your wallet.
borlette.text_50: The result has not been published yet.
borlette.text_52: The ticket matched a winning prize.
borlette.text_56: The payout has already been added to your wallet.
borlette.text_58: Only play with money you can afford to lose.
borlette.text_59: This page explains the rules only. Wallet, result, and game logic remain unchanged.
